[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011111 7
1 11111010 6
2 10011000 3
3 11001101 5
4 11111001 6
5 10001011 4
6 01111010 5
7 11111010 6
